overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dense forest at night, holding a torch to illuminate a narrow dirt path. The character approaches and crosses a wooden footbridge over a body of water, with the held torch and hand becoming visible midway through the clip.

events.description: character's hand holding a wooden torch enters the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path through dense forest, illuminating the ground ahead with a torch

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming a dense dark canopy on the left side of the path
tall pine trees forming a dense dark canopy on the right side of the path
narrow dirt path winding through the forest with patches of grass
wooden bridge structure visible in the distance at the end of the path
scattered fallen tree branches and logs beside the trail
stone support pillars at the entrance to the wooden bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a dense forest at night along a narrow dirt trail. The path is illuminated by a torch, revealing tall trees on both sides and fallen branches scattered nearby. A wooden footbridge with stone pillars is visible ahead in the distance, and at around 13 seconds, the character's hand holding the torch becomes visible on the left side of the frame.

events.description: torch flame becomes prominently visible creating a bright light flare

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge while holding the torch out to illuminate the planks and railings

entered.detail: wooden planks forming the walking surface of the bridge
wooden log railings on the left side of the bridge
wooden log railings on the right side of the bridge
calm water visible below the bridge on the left side, reflecting the torchlight

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wooden footbridge, transitioning from dirt to wooden planks. The bridge has log railings on both sides and spans over a body of water visible on the left. The torch illuminates the wooden structure as the character walks across, with the flame becoming prominently visible around the 19-second mark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark, dense forest that culminates in the crossing of a rustic wooden bridge. It begins with a walk along a narrow dirt trail flanked by towering trees and scattered fallen branches, all illuminated by the flickering glow of a torch. As the camera advances, the character's hand holding the torch enters the frame on the left, guiding the way toward a distant structure with stone pillars. The scene then shifts as the terrain transitions from dirt to wooden planks, leading the camera onto a footbridge with log railings. Finally, the torchlight prominently illuminates the wooden structure and the adjacent body of water as the character completes the crossing.
